name: MakeMyTrip
description: India's largest online travel agency for flights, hotels, holiday packages, and bus bookings with GoIbibo and Redbus subsidiaries
pros: Largest selection of domestic flights, hotels, and holiday packages in India
Owns GoIbibo and Redbus — covers flights, hotels, and buses
Trip.com stake reduced from 45% to 17% in 2025 buyback
Good rewards program (myBiz for corporate, MyWallet credits)
cons: Incorporated in Cayman Islands, listed on NASDAQ — not Indian entity
Customer support for cancellations and refunds is poor
Hidden charges appear during checkout (convenience fees, insurance)
userComplaints: Refund process for cancelled bookings takes weeks
Prices shown in search results change at checkout
Hotel ratings on the platform don't match reality
